Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor.CborMetaProvider

Packages that use CborMetaProvider
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.

  • Uses of CborMetaProvider in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that implement CborMetaProvider
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborParser
    Parses CBOR streams (RFC 8949) into POJO models.
    static class 
    CborParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    static class 
    CborParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    class 
    CborSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to CBOR (RFC 8949).
    static class 
    CborSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    static class 
    CborSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
